2026-06-11NRCANCanada-Newfoundland and Labrador Atlantic Accord Implementation ActReappointment of a member of the Canada-Newfoundland and Labrador Offshore Energy RegulatorReappointment of Sharon Murphy of St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, as a member of the Canada-Newfoundland and Labrador Offshore Energy Regulator, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of six years, effective November 18, 2026.N/A
act: Canada-Newfoundland and Labrador Atlantic Accord Implementation Act
subject: Reappointment of a member of the Canada-Newfoundland and Labrador Offshore Energy Regulator
precis: Reappointment of Sharon Murphy of St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, as a member of the Canada-Newfoundland and Labrador Offshore Energy Regulator, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of six years, effective November 18, 2026.
